<!-- AUTOGENERATED by scripts/gen-readmes.sh — edit scenarios.tsv -->
# Apache HTTPD (HTTP) — servlet-mapping

App at / with Vaadin servlet bound to /ui/*. /HILLA/* (Hilla push) and /connect/* (Hilla browser-callables) live at the context root, so the proxy rewrites /ui/HILLA/* and /ui/connect/* back to /HILLA/* and /connect/*. Root-level static resources flow through the catch-all.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/ui/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
# Hilla resources (/HILLA/* push and /connect/* browser-callables) live at the
# backend's context root regardless of vaadin.url-mapping, so the proxy strips
# the /ui prefix for those. Everything else falls through the catch-all.
# See https://github.com/vaadin/hilla/issues/289

ProxyPassMatch   "^/ui/(HILLA|connect)/(.*)$"  http://vaadin:8080/$1/$2 upgrade=websocket
ProxyPass        "/"                           http://vaadin:8080/ upgrade=websocket
ProxyPassReverse "/ui/HILLA/"                  http://vaadin:8080/HILLA/
ProxyPassReverse "/ui/connect/"                http://vaadin:8080/connect/
ProxyPassReverse "/"                           http://vaadin:8080/
```
